title: What happened after 2k people tried to hack my AI assistant
author: cuchoi
raw_description: Article URL: https://www.fernandoi.cl/posts/hackmyclaw/ Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48681687 Points: 363 # Comments: 160
summary: 作者分享其AI助手被2000人尝试攻击的经历，揭示了AI安全漏洞和防御策略，强调构建安全AI系统的重要性。
analysis_note: 真实案例有价值，但技术深度一般，偏向安全实践而非核心AI突破。
